name: Morgen
description: A productivity app combining calendar, task management, and scheduling, designed to simplify time management with AI-powered planning and multi-platform support.
longDescription:
Morgen Calendar is a productivity app launched in 2019 as a spin-off from ETH Zurich, integrating calendar, task management, and scheduling into a single platform. It aims to streamline time management with AI-powered planning and real-time sync across devices, supporting professionals and students alike.

Based in Zurich, Switzerland, Morgen is available on macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, and Android, offering a seamless experience with integrations like Google Calendar and Todoist. It emphasizes privacy with Swiss data protection laws and features a clean, intuitive interface.

Developed by a Swiss company, Morgen has grown since 2020 into a well-established SaaS, focusing on user-friendly design and innovative features like AI planning and availability sharing, positioning it as a strong competitor to traditional calendar tools.
